title: DeathLogPlus
description: Records your deaths with cause, location, date/time, and inventory snapshot.
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

A utility mod that automatically saves your death information and provides a simple menu to review it later. All death logs are persistent, meaning they remain saved even after you restart the game, and are tracked relative to the specific single-player world or multiplayer server you are playing on.

![Record of death](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d150780db926f4c222641fcc7b2433b608935a_0.webp)

**Client-side only** (no server installation required). **Fully compatible with singleplayer**.

**What it saves:**
- Date, time, and cause of death.
- Death coordinates (with a quick-copy button).
- Experience level and total XP lost.
- Your exact inventory layout, including tooltips and enchantments.

**Usage:**
Open the interface using the /deaths command or the customizable hotkey.

**Details:**
- All data is stored locally in your client folder.
- Fully translated into 10 languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese, Korean, and Italian.

**Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord:** [https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)
